2fa.enrollment_instructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code below.
2fa.code_expired: This code has expired. Generate a new one.
2fa.backup_codes_warning: Each code can be used only once. Store them in a safe place.
2fa.step_up_instructions: Enter your 2FA code to authorize this sensitive action.
2fa.sensitive_action_required: This action requires recent two-factor verification. Please re-verify.
2fa.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please wait {minutes} minutes and try again.
2fa.disable_confirm: Enter your current code to disable two-factor authentication.
2fa.regenerate_backup_codes: Enter your current code to regenerate backup codes.
2fa.replay_detected: This code has already been used. Generate a new one.

chat.unauthorized: Unauthorized connection — invalid or missing token
